message:
fix: Copilot follow-up from #6368 — condense bump history + generalize validation keys (#6369) (#6373)

Closes #6369

Two nits from Copilot on merged PR #6368.

1. ui-ux-standards.test.ts bump history: the 303 → 304 entry spanned
   three lines, which broke the established grep-able one-line format.
   Condensed to a single line.

2. validation.yaml fail messages hard-coded the Secret key names as
   `github-client-id` / `github-client-secret` / `claude-api-key` /
   `google-drive-api-key` / `feedback-github-token`, but the chart
   lets users override each via the `*.existingSecretKey[s]` values.
   Generalized each fail message to report BOTH the default key name
   (from the current values) AND the override path, so users get
   accurate guidance regardless of whether they've customized the
   key names.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
